summary: Frontend-only testing of 3 features: P0 delivery settings filter (PASS), P2 pending sellers documents (CANNOT VERIFY - no pending sellers), P2 pending drivers documents (CANNOT VERIFY - no pending drivers). Filter functionality fully working - clicking each category correctly shows/hides relevant sections.
critical_code_review_comments: DeliverySettingsTab.js (Lines 497-527, 529-578): Filter categories correctly implemented with activeCategory state. Conditional rendering properly applied to each section using {(activeCategory === 'all' || activeCategory === 'category_name') && (...)}

SellersTab.js (Lines 135-200): Documents grid correctly implemented for pending status. Shows national_id, commercial_registration, shop_photo, health_certificate with cursor-pointer and onClick handlers
DeliveryTab.js (Lines 88-120): Driver documents grid correctly implemented with personal_photo, id_photo, motorcycle_license. All images have cursor-pointer class and onClick to open in new tab

categories_tested.all: Shows all sections (dispatch, violations, prices, times, orders, rewards)
categories_tested.prices: Shows أجور التوصيل بالمسافة, أرباح السائق - hides dispatch/violations
categories_tested.times: Shows وقت انتظار التوصيل, ساعات عمل التوصيل - hides dispatch/violations
categories_tested.orders: Shows حالة التوزيع التلقائي, إعدادات قبول طلبات الطعام
categories_tested.penalties: Shows تقرير المخالفات, تعويض انتظار السائق
categories_tested.rewards: Shows جوائز الصدارة, مستويات أداء السائقين - hides dispatch

pending_sellers_documents.reason: No pending product sellers in the system (بائعين = 0)
pending_sellers_documents.code_verified: Lines 135-200 in SellersTab.js show document grid with national_id, commercial_registration, shop_photo, health_certificate images with cursor-pointer class

pending_drivers_documents.reason: No pending delivery drivers in the system (سائقين = 0)
pending_drivers_documents.code_verified: Lines 88-120 in DeliveryTab.js show document grid with personal_photo, id_photo, motorcycle_license images with cursor-pointer class and onClick handlers

context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter functionality in DeliverySettingsTab fully working. Cannot test pending sellers/drivers documents display as there are 0 pending users in the system. Code review confirmed correct implementation.
